text:
Created attachment 146958
The port in shar format (20140907)

The port updated to 20140907 release version:
https://github.com/pioneerspacesim/pioneer/releases/tag/20140907

The build log is for previous version, but I tested new version on real FreeBSD 10 system and it works (by using ports-mgmt/portmaster).
